calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Regarding Distribution Of Deceased Beneficiarys Share
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alyssa Daatio appeared by zoom for and with Nina Chellew by zoom and Noemi Hayes by zoom (trustees).

The court stated that it sees the ambiguity and low-grade conflict in the trust document with respect to Lydia. Mrs. Daatio stated that she has not heard of any objections from any of the beneficiaries. The Petition for Instructions Regarding Distribution of Deceased Beneficiaries Share is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: W. James. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
